n: New Travel System Between BG City Areas
no: Adds a new travel system between Baldur"s Gate city areas. Install after EET_End.

in.t: Rename the extracted folder from BG_Travel-MOD-for-BG1-BGEE-BGT-Tutu-EET-2.1 to BG_TRAVEL before installing.

ki.pattern: ERROR Installing \[New travel system between Baldur.s Gate City\]|BG_Travel.*not found
ki.description: BG_Travel archive extracts to a folder named 'BG_Travel-MOD-for-BG1-BGEE-BGT-Tutu-EET-2.1' but WeiDU expects the folder to be named 'BG_TRAVEL'.
ki.workaround: Rename the extracted folder to BG_TRAVEL before installing.

ki.description: BG_Travel cn:66 (Full version) may silently skip when installed in the POST EET phase. The component has game-state conditions that can fail after eet_end finalizes the install. Observed in session 88733aac (2026-04-16): batch 512 — 0 ok, 1 skip. The minimalistic version (cn:661) was not in this install and may behave differently.
ki.workaround: Known limitation. If the component skips, the travel system simply isn't installed — no corruption or side effects. Check WSETUP.DEBUG for the specific REQUIRE that failed if you want to troubleshoot.
ki.source: Session references extracted from description on 2026-04-21 during Phase 2.3 validator rollout: session 88733aac

sum: Adds a new travel system for moving between Baldur's Gate city areas, replacing the standard area transitions with a faster navigation method.

co.no: Archive extracts to flat folder 'BG_Travel-MOD-for-BG1-BGEE-BGT-Tutu-EET-2.1' — needs manual rename to BG_TRAVEL before install
co.scn: New travel system between Baldur's Gate City areas

co.tp2n: Minimalistic version, allow entering two originally inaccesible small regions of BG city
co.no: Archive extracts to flat folder 'BG_Travel-MOD-for-BG1-BGEE-BGT-Tutu-EET-2.1' — needs manual rename to BG_TRAVEL before install
co.scn: New travel system between Baldur's Gate City areas
